home.tagline: The world's most exclusive concierge platform. Elite companions, curated venues, and a luxury fleet — all under one discreet roof.

companion.title: Elite Companion Matching
companion.desc: AI-powered pairing of multi-lingual, skill-verified companions to your exact event requirements. Corporate galas, diplomatic dinners, international travel.

venue.title: Premium Venue Booking
venue.desc: Private penthouses, rooftop terraces, secret members clubs, and estate villas — bookable by the hour. Real-time availability with dynamic VIP add-ons.

fleet.title: Luxury Fleet & Chauffeur
fleet.desc: Rolls-Royce, Bentley, Maybach. Multi-lingual drivers with VIP protocol training. Hourly, daily, and airport transfer rates.

identity.title: Verified Identities
identity.desc: Every companion and driver undergoes rigorous background verification, document checks, and in-person vetting.

escrow.title: Escrow-Protected Payments
escrow.desc: Funds are held in secure escrow and only released to providers after event completion — zero risk for clients.

privacy.title: Privacy Masking
privacy.desc: Companion photos remain blurred until a booking is confirmed. Your discretion is our architecture.

global.title: Global Multi-Lingual
global.desc: 15+ languages across our network. From Mandarin boardroom dinners to Arabic diplomatic receptions.

cta.heading: Ready to experience the extraordinary?
cta.body: Join a curated community of founders, executives, and tastemakers who expect nothing less than flawless.

companions.heading: Your Perfect Match
companions.countLabel: {count} verified companions available. Bidirectional gender matching with AI-powered skill alignment.

login.heading: Welcome Back
login.sub: Sign in to your Alpha Zone account

register.heading: Request Access
register.sub: Join the world's most exclusive concierge platform
register.disclaimer: By requesting access, you agree to our Terms of Service and NDA Policy. All applications are reviewed within 24 hours.

partners.heading: Trusted by Business Leaders
partners.sub: Alpha Zone is the platform of choice for executives, corporations, and premium service providers across Central Asia and beyond.

testimonials.heading: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.sub: Voices from the leaders who trust Alpha Zone.

items.text: Alpha Zone completely transformed how we organize our executive events. The venue selection and partner matching are simply unmatched.
items.name: Rustam Nazarov

items.text: From fleet coordination to VIP companion matching — every detail was flawless. This is how business hospitality should work.
items.name: Asel Dzhaksybekova

items.text: We've used Alpha Zone for three international delegations. Discreet, professional, and always one step ahead.
items.name: Timur Hakimov

items.text: The venue curation is extraordinary. Our Gulf partners were deeply impressed by the arrangements.
items.name: Nilufar Yusupova

items.text: Invitation-only access means quality is guaranteed. Every experience with Alpha Zone has exceeded expectations.
items.name: Bobur Tashkentov

items.text: Our corporate retreats are now handled exclusively through Alpha Zone. The level of service is in a different league.
items.name: Diana Karimova

items.text: From the first contact to the final invoice — seamless. Alpha Zone understands what business leaders need.
items.name: Jasur Mirzayev

items.text: The fleet service alone is worth every dollar. Rolls-Royce with multilingual chauffeurs made our clients feel truly valued.
items.name: Kamola Ergasheva

items.text: In my 20 years of executive work, I have not encountered a service platform this refined. Alpha Zone sets the standard.
items.name: Alisher Rakhimov

globe.heading: Operating Across the World
globe.sub: From Tashkent to Dubai, London to Singapore — Alpha Zone connects business leaders with premium services wherever they operate.

footer.tagline: The world's most exclusive concierge platform. Elite companions, curated venues, and a luxury fleet — all under one discreet roof.
